name: wow-countdown-timer
description: Live countdown to a merchant-set end date (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS) showing days, hours, minutes, and seconds. Vanilla-JS IIFE scoped to the section ID via document.getElementById, updates every second with setInterval, pads each value to two digits with String.padStart, and replaces the timer with a merchant-set expired message when the countdown reaches zero (also clearing the interval and hiding the CTA). Listens for shopify:section:unload to clear the interval and detach handlers — Theme Editor safe. Each digit block is a separate styled container (bg color, border, radius — all merchant-controlled) with the digit + optional label below; colon separators between blocks. aria-live='polite' + aria-atomic='true' on the timer wrapper so screen readers get the time-remaining announcement without spamming the user every second. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/timer_digits/timer_labels, §8.3 button settings, §8.6 background, §8.8 layout (content_alignment, content_position, content_max_width, section_width), §8.9 universal. Independent separator color and digit-block styling tokens. Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets.
